subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who is established upon the Throne and Who ruleth as He willeth through the sovereignty of His Command, and verily He is This and This [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی استقر علی العرش و یحکم ما یشاء بسلطان الامر و انه هو هذا و هذا
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
